name_en: Top-tier original factory with full packaging
name_cn:
Top-tier original factory with full packaging
White in stock!!️
Ange Autumn/Winter Collection, an irresistible elegant aura. Crafted from imported calfskin, featuring oversized diamond quilting that is retro yet stylish. The gold metal handle is engraved with the iconic lettering, and the exquisite pearl lock exudes a sense of high-end luxury. The chain strap is adorned with small pearls, and the multi-compartment design is both beautiful and very practical for daily use. A must-have for little princesses
size:25*16.5*8cm
